steps.title: Find the initial value
steps.content: The present value is the value when $x=0$, so the initial value is $186{,}000$.

steps.title: Find the yearly multiplier
steps.content: A yearly increase of $3.2\%$ means multiplying by $1+0.032=1.032$ each year.

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content:
Use the exponential form $f(x)=a(b)^x$ with $a=186{,}000$ and $b=1.032$.
$$f(x)=186{,}000(1.032)^x$$
The answer is C.
